basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Full Stack Web Developer, Automation Test Engineer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Full Stack Web Developer, Automation Test Engineer
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Full Stack Web Developer and Automation Test Engineer Notification 2026 has been released under Advt. No. P1/Adhoc/Recr/2026-27 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged up to 50 years who possess B.Sc, MS, M.Sc, BCA, MCA, B.Tech, B.E., M.Tech, or M.E. qualifications in any specialization are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The online application process is currently open and will remain active until 16 June 2026. Candidates can download the official

age_limit.details: Full Stack Web Developer: Maximum age limit is 50 years. Automation Test Engineer: Maximum age limit is 50 years.

qualification.details: B.Sc/MS/M.Sc in Any Specialization BCA/MCA B.Tech/B.E. in Any Specialization M.Tech / M.E in Any Specialization Minimum 3 years of experience in full-stack Web application development (Angular & Laravel) | B.Sc/MS/M.Sc in Any Specialization BCA/MCA B.Tech / B.E. in Any Specialization M.Tech / M.E in Any Specialization Minimum 2 years of experience in Automation Test Engineer (Selenium or Playwright).

selection_process: Online application and payment of fee Emailing relevant documents Skill test and/or trade test (decided by selection committee)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Calicut Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Calicut Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the NIT Calicut recruitment is 16th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Full Stack Web Developer post?
faq.answer: For the Full Stack Web Developer position, candidates need a B.Sc/MS/M.Sc, BCA/MCA, B.Tech/B.E., or M.Tech/M.E. in any specialization.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Full Stack Web Developer and Automation Test Engineer posts is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Full Stack Web Developer position?
faq.answer: The Full Stack Web Developer will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 50,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Calicut recruitment?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official NIT Calicut website. The application process involves filling the form, paying the fee, and emailing relevant documents.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. SC/ST/Women/ESM/PwBD candidates need to pay Rs. 500, while other candidates must pay Rs. 1000.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an online application, payment of fee, emailing of documents, and potentially a skill test and/or trade test.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. What is the required experience for the Automation Test Engineer role?
faq.answer: For the Automation Test Engineer role, a minimum of 2 years of experience in Automation Test Engineer (Selenium or Playwright) is required.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.
